name: DriveX City
description: Experience the ultimate 3D driving adventure in DriveX City! Explore a massive open world with stunning graphics and dynamic gameplay across 16 unique themes and 15 exciting game modes.
instructions: KEYBOARD Desktop W Arrow Up - Accelerate Drive Forward S Arrow Down - Brake Reverse A Arrow Left - Turn Left D Arrow Right - Turn Right SHIFT - Nitro Boost when available SPACE - Jump Double-click Title - Toggle Sound ON OFF MOBILE TOUC
